name: ateam
description: Specialist AI agents orchestrated as a configurable team pipeline for Codex.

interface.longDescription: ATeam provides specialist roles as Codex agents. Talk to @Architect, @Reviewer, @Pm directly, or use @ATeam to run the full pipeline. Configure roles, write policies, and custom team members via .agenteam/config.yaml.
defaultPrompt: Refactor this codebase to be more maintainable
